headline: TV Power Duo Rob Eric and Ramy Romany Ink Major WME Deal
lede: Former Queer Eye creative chief Rob Eric and Bachelor in Paradise director Ramy Romany have secured agency representation that could turbocharge their nascent production company.
body:
After launching From The Creators Productions last year, Rob Eric and Ramy Romany have quickly transformed their indie operation into an agency-backed powerhouse by signing with WME.

The partnership signals serious industry momentum for the creative team, who bring complementary skills from reality and documentary production backgrounds. Eric, previously the Chief Creative Officer at Scout Productions, arrives with significant unscripted television credibility after his transformative work on *Queer Eye*.

Romany's directing experience, particularly with *Bachelor in Paradise*, provides the production company additional versatility across entertainment formats. WME's comprehensive representation promises to amplify their development and packaging capabilities across multiple genres.

Industry sources suggest the pair are positioning themselves as flexible content creators capable of producing both compelling documentary and unscripted entertainment programming. Their track record of innovative storytelling makes them an attractive prospect for streaming platforms and traditional networks seeking fresh creative voices.
key_facts: Launched From The Creators Productions in 2025
WME represents them across all media platforms
Eric previously led creative strategy at Scout Productions
Romany has directed major reality television series
